title: Decoranddecor Spectra Matt Black Aluminium Lever Handles – Internal Door Set with Mortice Latch, Sleek Contemporary Design for Bedrooms, Bathrooms, and Modern Home or Office Interiors
features: Black internal door handles: Spectra lever set features durable aluminium alloy with matt black finish; includes 2.5-inch tubular mortice latch for enhanced functionality
Interior door handles with modern appeal: Square profile design on 55mm rose; 127mm handle length and 65mm projection suitable for 35-42mm thick doors
Door handle set for versatile use: Black handles for doors ideal for bedrooms, living rooms, and throughout the home; Push to Fit rose ensures easy installation
Black interior door handles with latch: Complete kit includes fire-rated tubular latch with soft sprung mechanism; suitable for both domestic and commercial applications
Square door handles for contemporary style: Black door handles interior mounted on square rose add sophistication; durable finish resists daily wear and tear
description: Product Description The Spectra door handle lever set from Decor&Decor, constructed from durable aluminium alloy and coated in a sleek matt black finish, is a modern and minimalist design. The square profile holding part adds sophistication, while the lever on square rose ensures a comfortable grip. The Push to Fit rose feature simplifies installation and extends the lifespan of the handles. The 127mm handle length, 65mm projection, and 55mm rosette diameter make it suitable for standard UK door thicknesses ranging from 35-42mm. This door handle lever set is designed for interior use only and can be used in various rooms of your home, including the bedroom, basement, conservatory, garage, kitchen, living room, porch, playroom, office, dining room, and even storage cupboards. The Spectra door handle lever set from Decor&Decor, with its durable construction, modern design, and easy installation, is a sophisticated choice for updating door handles. Decor&Decor also offers a matching 2.5 inch back set tubular mortice latch for the Spectra door handle lever set. This latch, made from the same durable steel alloy as the door handle and coated in the same sleek matt black finish, is suitable for standard UK door thicknesses ranging from 44mm to 64mm. The soft sprung latch ensures effortless operation. The tubular mortice latch comes with matching striker plates and screws for easy installation. This latch is suitable for both domestic and commercial doors. Spectra Door Handle in Matt Black Colour - Handle Set and Latch Kit Spectra - Square Rose Door Lever Handles and Latch Kit With a 10.5mm rosette thickness, the Spectra door handle lever set is perfect for indoor use only.The tubular mortice latch comes with matching striker plates and screws for easy installation. This latch is suitable for both domestic and commercial doors. Matt Black Internal Door Handle Sets on Square Rose With a Tubular Latch The handles come in a sleek and sophisticated matt black colour, making them a versatile choice that can effortlessly complement various décor styles. The lever is mounted on a 54mm round rose, adding a subtle charm to the overall design. 2.5 Inch Tubular Latch Kit for Fire Doors In addition to the stylish and modern Spectra door handle lever set, Decor&Decor also offers it with a matching 2.5 inch back set tubular mortice latch. This latch is made from the same durable steel alloy as the door handle and is coated in the same sleek matt black finish. The 2.5-inch back set makes it suitable for standard UK door thicknesses ranging from 44mm to 64mm. The soft sprung latch ensures effortless operation, adding convenience to style. Included tubular latch is fire rated and can be used with fire doors. Matt Black Internal Door Handle Set Contents Door Handle & Latch Kit Additional to Spectra matt black door handle set, latch kit comes with a similar colour tubular mortise latch. Latch has a 2.5 inch back set. Great solution for any internal doors doesn't need locks. Door Handle & Bathroom Lock Kit Additional to Spectra matt black door handle set, bathroom lock kit comes with a 2.5 inch back set internal bathroom lock, a set of thumb turn & release, 5mmx5mm spindle and all necessary fixings. Door Handle & Sash Lock Kit With Two Keys Additional to Spectra matt black door handle set, sash lock kit comes with a 2.5 inch back set internal lock with two keys. A pair of matching colour key roses also included along with all necessary fixings.
